commands.review_summary:
The PR anchors Mattermost slash command account state on a Symbol.for globalThis Map and adds slash-state tests for module reload sharing.

PR surface: Source +21, Tests +43. Total +64 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. issue steps plus current source show registerFull loads the route through the bundled-entry loader while monitor activation writes to module-local accountStates, and v2026.6.1 still has that shape. I did not run a live Mattermost gateway in this read-only review.

target.title: fix(mattermost): anchor slash state on globalThis (#68113)
target.body:
## Summary

- Fix Mattermost slash command callbacks returning permanent HTTP 503 with "Slash commands are not yet initialized" after gateway startup.
- Anchor per-account slash routing state on `globalThis` via `Symbol.for("openclaw.mattermost.slash-account-states")` so jiti-loaded HTTP route registration and ESM monitor activation share the same `accountStates` map (same approach as closed PR #69038).
- Add regression tests for global singleton anchoring and state surviving `vi.resetModules()`.

## Linked context

Closes #68113

Related #69038

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: Slash HTTP route handler saw an empty `accountStates` map while monitor logs showed slash commands activated (dual module loader instances).
- Real environment tested: Unit tests in this repo (Vitest extension-mattermost profile).
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm test extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/slash-state.test.ts`
- Evidence after fix: 6/6 tests pass, including "preserves slash state across module reloads".
- Observed result after fix: `activateSlashCommands` state is visible after simulated module reload via shared `globalThis` map.
- What was not tested: Live Mattermost gateway roundtrip with nginx callback URL (no MM server in CI).
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: Live repro requires user Mattermost + gateway; issue reporter steps remain the acceptance bar for maintainers.

## Tests and validation

- `pnpm test extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/slash-state.test.ts` (6 passed)

## Reviewer focus

- Confirm `globalThis` singleton does not leak state across gateway restarts without `deactivateSlashCommands`.
- Multi-account ambiguous token routing unchanged.
